category_sources: source_facts.description says tools for manipulating HTS data and formats; official Picard docs describe command-line tools for high-throughput sequencing formats.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is picard-tools; official docs use Picard as the project name for these tools.
docs_sources: Official Broad Institute GitHub Pages site provides Picard documentation and command-line overview.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/broadinstitute/picard, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Picard docs identify HTS, SAM/BAM/CRAM, VCF, and Java command-line tooling.
